_description: Blueprint for parallel code review teams. Three reviewers run simultaneously.
_requires: Set CLAUDE_CODE_EXPERIMENTAL_AGENT_TEAMS=1 in your shell or settings.json env section
_workflow: Parallel: lead → [security, correctness, style] → lead aggregates
_usage: TeamCreate with this blueprint, or reference via /review command

roles.name: lead
roles.role: Aggregator — distributes diff to all reviewers, collects findings, deduplicates, produces final verdict (APPROVE / REQUEST CHANGES)

roles.name: security-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: injection, auth bypass, exposed secrets, unsafe input, OWASP top 10, dependency vulnerabilities

roles.name: correctness-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: logic errors, null/undefined access, race conditions, missing edge cases, test coverage gaps

roles.name: style-reviewer
roles.role: Reviews for: naming conventions, vertical slice violations, code organization, dead code, import ordering

sequence: 1. lead distributes diff and context to all reviewers
2. security, correctness, and style reviewers run in parallel
3. lead aggregates findings, deduplicates, and produces final categorized report
